title: The Biblical Truth of UFOs & Angels (Ft. Karl Nell & Diana Pasulka)
summary: This interview features a panel discussion at Hereticon exploring the connection between UFOs as modern scientific phenomena and historical religious experiences like angel encounters. Colonel Karl Nell presents evidence for UFO reality from first principles, testimonial sources, and data, while Professor Diana Walsh Pasulka discusses her research finding parallels between modern UFO reports and medieval Catholic angel contact events in historical archives.

acronyms.definition: Modern term for UFOs used by government and military
Experience reported by people who have clinically died and been revived
Intelligence that is not of human origin

events.description: Gordon Cooper chased UFOs over West Germany
Radar visual sightings over Washington DC for two weekends including air-to-air intercepts, precipitating largest press conference since WWII
Robertson Panel at CIA decided to debunk UFO topic and infiltrate public UFO organizations
Nicolai Kardashev proposed the Kardashev scale for classifying civilizations
UFO incident at Westall, Australia where craft landed and beings presented themselves to children
Gordon Cooper testified before the United Nations about UFO encounters
Miguel Alcubierre solved Einstein's equations for effective faster than light mechanism
UFO craft landed in Ruwa, Zimbabwe and beings presented themselves to elementary school children in middle of day
UFO encounter documented in the FLIR video
Diana Walsh Pasulka began receiving inquiries from aerospace companies about her angel contact research
Diana Walsh Pasulka published 'Heaven Can Wait' about Catholic concept of purgatory
UFO encounters documented in Gimbal and Go Fast videos
Diana Walsh Pasulka visited UFO crash debris site with Tyler and others
David Grusch testified before House Committee on Oversight about government UAP program

key_claims.claim: Life evolved on Earth at the earliest possible time, with evidence of blue-green algae from 3.5 billion years ago and possibly life as early as 4.1 billion years ago
Negative energy exists and is demonstrated by the Casimir effect and dark energy, providing theoretical basis for faster-than-light travel
There is an agreement between the Soviet Union and United States still in force to notify each other if UFOs impact missile early warning systems
In the 1960s, ICBMs at Malmstrom Air Force Base were taken offline during UFO incidents, and Soviet missiles were brought online in an analogous incident
St. Francis of Assisi's stigmata was caused by contact with a seraphim that injured him, likely through electromagnetic radiation
Aerospace company personnel contacted Diana Walsh Pasulka wanting her historical angel contact data, specifically asking about injuries reported by witnesses
A person pseudonymously called Tyler claimed to have acquired debris from UFO crash sites and was reverse engineering them to create gamechanging technology
The CIA brought files of people with anomalous experiences to Gary Nolan at Stanford for study
Jack Parsons, father of US rocketry, believed he was in contact with non-human intelligence
Konstantin Tsiolkovsky, father of Russian rocketry, believed in non-human intelligence and wrote books about it
The Casimir effect extracts energy from the vacuum, which is proven fact, but no one has figured out how to make a reciprocating machine from it
